Title: Okkonen, Onni
Overview: Scholar of Italian art, succeeded J. J. Tikkanen as a professor of aesthetics and art history at the University of Helsinki.
Sources: Vakkari, Johanna. "Alcuni contemporanei finlandesi di Lionello Venturi: Osvald Siren, Tancred Borenius, Onni Okkonen." Storia dell'Arte 101 (2002): 108-17.
